name: chief-ai-officer-advisor
description: Chief AI Officer advisory for startups: model build-vs-buy decisions (API vs fine-tune vs in-house), AI risk classification under EU AI Act + US state patchwork, AI cost economics (API-to-self-hosted breakeven), and AI team org evolution. Use when deciding whether to call an API or fine-tune, classifying AI use cases for regulatory risk, calculating when self-hosting pays off, sequencing AI hires, or when user mentions CAIO, AI strategy, model selection, foundation model, fine-tuning, EU AI Act,
author: alirezarezvani
summary_zh: 专为初创公司打造的AI战略顾问，能帮你搞定模型选型、合规风险评估、自建成本测算和团队组建等落地难题，适合制定AI战略或做技术决策时使用。
